note: Ayat al-Kursi
Closing du'a of Al-Baqarah
Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana
Malik al-Mulk
Mercy from Allah
Hasbunallah
Signs for those of understanding
Allah does not change a people's condition
Hearts find rest in the remembrance of Allah
If you are grateful, I will increase you
A good life for the righteous
Kindness to parents
Rabbi adkhilni
Rabbi shrah li sadri
Rabbi zidni ilma
Du'a of Yunus
Our Lord, make our spouses and offspring a comfort
Du'a of Musa
Do people think they will be left alone
Those who strive for Us
Do not despair of the mercy of Allah
Call upon Me and I will respond
Those who say our Lord is Allah
The most honored is the most righteous
Which of your Lord's favors will you deny
The life of this world is play and amusement
No calamity befalls except by Allah's leave
Whoever fears Allah — He will make a way out
Whoever relies on Allah — sufficient is He
Allah does not burden a soul beyond its capacity
Which of you is best in deed
Whatever good you send forth
Successful is the one who purifies
O soul at peace — return to your Lord
Your Lord has not forsaken you
He found you lost and guided
With hardship comes ease
Indeed, with hardship comes ease
Surah Al-Asr — By time
Qul huwa Allahu ahad
